chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1273 of 2021 [Allah Bachayo & others v. Province of Sindh & others] DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) Present: Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry J. Riazat Ali Sahar J. For orders on office objections. For hearing of main case. 23.04.2026 Ms. Nasim Abbasi, Advocate along-with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General, Sindh along-with Naeem Ahmed and Muhammad Alam (AEOs). == Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J- Confronted with the maintainability of prayer clause-1, learned counsel does not press the same and confines the petition to prayer clause-2 which is as follows: “2. To declare that the respondents are under legal obligation to accommodate the petitioners on vacant posts on preferential grounds.” The petitioners submit that they were issued offer letters for appointment to posts BPS-02 on contract in the Office of the EDO Education, Badin in the year 2008; that though they fulfilled codal formalities, they were not issued appointment orders. On the other hand, comments filed by the District Education Officer Badin are that the offer letters relied upon by the petitioners are fake and were never issued. Learned counsel for the petitioners does not bring forth any convincing reason to doubt the statement that offer letters relied upon are fake. The petitioners have not placed on record any advertisement for the underlying recruitment process. The fitness certificates relied upon also do not demonstrate that the medical examination was conducted for appointment in Government Service. Furthermore no explanation has been given as to why petitioners waited for more than a decade before approaching this Court.

The fitness certificates relied upon also do not demonstrate that the medical examination was conducted for appointment in Government Service. Furthermore no explanation has been given as to why petitioners waited for more than a decade before approaching this Court. For the foregoing reasons, the petition is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
